case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY KING BAIL BONDS
ORDER BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY-GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, FILED BY DEFENDANT
